Apportionment Of Settlement Funds.
Off Calendar Mar-04-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Apportionment of Settlement Funds hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Russell K. Marne, Esq. for Plaintiff: Mary Jo Chavers.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court taken this matter under submission.
Proposed Order rec'd in court.

Mar. 4, 2005
Order granted to Disptribute Settlement Funds and signed by Comm. Kaplan.
See details of Order in scanned doc.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Realign Defendant Hier As Pltf.
Off Calendar Feb-15-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances. Christopher E. Andreas, Esq., 415-898-1555, appeared on behalf of plaintiff and moving party Mary Jo Chavers.

There being no opposition filed the Court granted Mary Jo Chavers' Motion to Re-align defendant heir as plaintiff. An order was signed in open court. (JJM/MD) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
